name: YjsE Pixel Art Direction
intent: A shared low-color material language across items, tools, weapons, stations, and UI
Deterministic nearest-neighbor delivery with binary alpha

canvas.legacyPolicy: Existing sprites retain manifest-declared dimensions until their regeneration wave.

silhouette.rule: Every standalone sprite uses a continuous one-pixel dark outer silhouette. Interior separators may use the same color sparingly.

shading.dithering: Only intentional one-pixel clusters on large surfaces; never noise.

composition.toolAndWeaponView: single strong diagonal, with neighboring silhouettes kept distinct
composition.worldObjectView: front or side-front with a stable horizontal baseline

materialLanguage.glass: Opaque stylized rim plus a distinct liquid mass; no translucency at sprite scale.
materialLanguage.metal: Dark body, one midtone plane, one warm edge highlight, optional pale specular pixel.
materialLanguage.wood: Broad clustered planes with at most two short grain marks.
materialLanguage.magic: Contained bright cluster with a dark contour; no soft glow outside alpha.

generationPipeline.source: Built-in image_gen for concept sources or a checked-in deterministic pixel generator for exact production raster output
generationPipeline.backgroundRemoval: Official imagegen remove_chroma_key.py helper with border auto-key, soft matte, thresholds 12/220, and despill
generationPipeline.delivery: Crop visible bounds, fit with nearest-neighbor, quantize to this palette, force binary alpha, and enforce the one-pixel outline. Deterministic generators write directly at final dimensions and record hashes in a wave provenance file.
